name: ZUGFeRD (DE) e-Invoicing
description: Germany ZUGFeRD 2.x / XRechnung (UN/CEFACT CII) e-invoicing adapter, contributed into invoice:adapter — sandboxed. Generates real EN 16931 CII, signs host-side (XAdES), and optionally transmits to a tenant-configured gateway.

settings.label: ZUGFeRD Gateway URL
settings.help: Optional HTTP endpoint that accepts the CII XML. Leave empty to only generate the document (for PDF/A-3 embedding).

secrets.label: Gateway Bearer Token
secrets.help: Optional bearer token for the gateway; injected host-side, never seen by the plugin.
